title: Run Configuration for Literature Library Evaluation
description: Single source of truth for every evaluation run. Generated by AI during intake; consumed by all downstream scripts.

path.description: Path to library file. Relative paths are resolved against the directory containing run-config.json.

format.description: v1.0: only json is fully supported. bibtex/csv/ris/zotero_mcp/zotero_api are declared for forward compatibility.

automation.description: v1.0: allow_search is informational only. allowed_sources/stop_conditions/allow_query_refinement are declared for forward compatibility but not yet enforced by scripts.

benchmark.description: A1 baseline file path. Produced by: manual/agent. Supports: A1.

gold.description: A2 gold set file path. Produced by: manual/agent. Supports: A2.

query_log.description: Run-log file. Produced by: user or search_for_eval.py. Supports: F1. Missing → F1 not_assessable.

query_hits.description: query-hits.json from search_for_eval.py. Produced by: search_for_eval.py. Supports: A2. Missing → A2 not_assessable.

query_plan.description: query-plan.json. Produced by: manual/agent. Supports: F1 traceability.

source_snapshot.description: Collector snapshot for A3. Produced by: collect_open_sources.py. Supports: A3. Missing → A3 not_assessable.

screening_decisions.description: Screening decisions for B/F5. Produced by: manual/agent. Supports: B GGR/DRR, F5 traceability. Missing → B discovery_only, F5 provenance-only.

deduplication_log.description: Dedup/version log. Produced by: normalize_candidates.py. Supports: F4. Missing → F4 not_assessable (version candidates).

search_meta.description: search_meta.json from search_for_eval.py. Produced by: search_for_eval.py. Supports: A2 sensitivity, B discovery candidates.

failed_sources.description: Names of sources that failed during collection. Produced by: all collectors. Supports: A2/A3 partial_snapshot downgrade.

output.description: v1.0: output is always md+html+json with zh-CN defaults. language/formats/include_standards_appendix are declared for forward compatibility but not yet enforced by the audit script.
